LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-DEFENDANTS STRATEGYN HOLDINGS, LLC, STRATEGYN, LLC, ANTHONY ULWICK AND MITCHELL AURAN'S DEMURRER TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE IN THE SECOND AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Norris Boothe of Kilpatrick Townsend & Stockton LLP telephone number 650-272-1426 for Cross-Complainant Jay Haynes.
John Brown of Conerstone Law Group telephone number 415-409-8600 for Cross-Defendants Anthony Ulwick, Mitchell Auran, Srategyn, LLC and Strategyn Holdings, LLC.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANTS STRATEGYN HOLDINGS, LLC, STRATEGYN, LLC, ANTHONY ULWICK and MITCHELL AURAN'S DEMURRER to the third cause of action for specific performance in the second amended cross-complaint is overruled. The current demurrer is an impermissible successive demurrer on a ground already adjudicated against cross-defendants. The February 3, 2016 order on cross-defendants' motion for judgment on the pleadings on the first amended cross-complaint necessarily rejected the sole argument advanced by the cross-defendants on this demurrer that an agreement based on personal services cannot be the basis for a claim for specific performance. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
